name: @lgtm-buzzer/evals
description: Promptfoo eval suite measuring quiz quality across LLM adapters (ADR-26).

scripts.evals: node scripts/generate-tests.mjs && promptfoo eval -c promptfoo.config.yaml --output results/latest.json
scripts.evals:quick: node scripts/generate-tests.mjs --quick && promptfoo eval -c promptfoo.config.yaml --filter-pattern 'ts-add-validator|dep-bump-only|docs-readme-update' --output results/latest-quick.json
scripts.evals:empty-quiz-control: node scripts/generate-tests.mjs && promptfoo eval -c promptfoo.empty-quiz.config.yaml --output results/empty-quiz-control.json
